### SimParam

>  SimParam (gen_map:jax.Array, ploidy:int,
>                traits:Optional[ForwardRef('TraitCollection')]=None,
>                snp_chips:List[ForwardRef('LociMap')]=<factory>,
>                sexes:str='no', recomb_params:tuple=(2.6, 0.0, 0.0),
>                n_threads:int=1, track_pedigree:bool=False,
>                track_recomb:bool=False, pedigree:Optional[jax.Array]=None,
>                last_id:int=0, var_e:Optional[jax.Array]=None)

\*A container for all global simulation parameters.

This object defines the static rules of the simulation, such as the
genetic map and ploidy. It is created once at the beginning of a
simulation and is treated as immutable.
